title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
